calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maura Balducchi.
Albert Boasberg, Esq. for Plaintiff: Thomas Aquilina, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ofelia Sandoval.
Matter is submitted and under submission, the Court to review the Trial Brief and the proposed Judgment received in court today.

Jan. 27, 2005
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
